headline: TechnipFMC Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Miss, Both Rise Y/Y
summary: FTI expects Subsea segment revenues of $9.2-$9.6 billion and Surface Technologies revenues of $1.15-$1.3 billion in 2026.

headline: 2 Unpopular Stocks That Deserve Some Love and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: Wall Street’s bearish price targets for the stocks in this article signal serious concerns. Such forecasts are uncommon in an industry where maintaining cordial corporate relationships often trumps delivering the hard truth.
